content.issue: Unit tests passing but E2E functionality failing
details: clawd-4io: Unit tests 'pass' but actual tests fail when run independently
clawd-r0y: Unit tests pass (62/62) but E2E shows rate limiting not working
Previous validations claimed success based only on unit tests
Actual functionality broken in both cases
content.risk: HIGH - Security and core features non-functional
recommendation: Mandate E2E testing BEFORE marking any validation complete
Stop accepting unit test success as validation evidence
Investigate why unit-E2E gap exists systematically
Review all recently 'validated' features for real functionality
evidence: clawd-4io validation notes show test failure contradicting claims
clawd-r0y E2E test logs: '❌ Rate limiting not triggered as expected'
